visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged Asian man with short-cropped greyish hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses and a black flat cap, is positioned centrally against a plain grey wall background. He is wearing a light pink t-shirt with a green graphic of a chameleon. He gestures actively with his hands, pointing and waving to emphasize his speech, while looking directly into the camera with a friendly and engaged expression. The lighting is bright and even, casting minimal shadows. Top-left corner displays brand logos and social media handles. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up shot of two smartphones, identified as the Vivo Y100 and V29 models, being held in a hand over a wooden counter. The screens are active, showing vibrant purple and pink color gradients. Graphic text overlays highlight specifications like battery and camera megapixels. The man's hand is visible holding the devices, which are sleek and modern in design. (3) Returning to the main speaker in the pink shirt, he continues his energetic presentation. Colorful graphical icons of the Google logo, a telephone, a washing machine, a car, and a dog appear and disappear around him to illustrate his points. His hand gestures are frequent and expressive, moving across the frame as he speaks about various service categories. (4) A brief shot shows a display shelf in a retail environment with several smartphones lined up side-by-side, including Realme and Vivo models. The lighting is typical of a retail store, with reflections on the glass and devices. The man's hands and cap are visible at the top of the frame as he gestures toward the product lineup. (5) The final sequence returns to the man in the pink shirt. He continues speaking with high energy. A small cartoon sticker of a nervous-looking girl appears near his shoulder briefly. He concludes by making a peace sign gesture near his face, maintaining a cheerful and confident eye contact with the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: i人福音! (2) [Subtitle]: Google搜尋新功能. [Subtitle]: 幫你代打電話. (3) [Subtitle]: 害怕跟陌生人講電話的人. [Subtitle]: 有福啦. (4) [Variety]: 米可推薦大家. (5) [Subtitle]: 最新的AI搜尋功能. [Subtitle]: 可以幫你打電話. [Subtitle]: 預約洗衣、修車. [Subtitle]: 甚至於寵物美容. [Slogan]: Gemini. [Slogan]: Duplex. [Subtitle]: 語音對話技術. (6) [Subtitle]: 使用者點選了搜尋結果旁的. [Subtitle]: 讓Google幫我打電話這個選項. [Subtitle]: 並且輸入需求項目. [Subtitle]: 詢問店家的價格. [Subtitle]: 或者是預約的時段. [Subtitle]: AI就會自動幫你. [Subtitle]: 撥打電話跟商家聯繫. [Subtitle]: 結束後還會回報你的結果. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以對於不喜歡社交. [Subtitle]: 不想講電話的i人來說. [Subtitle]: 根本是個救星. [Subtitle]: 但目前這項功能僅限美國推出. [Subtitle]: 亞洲市場要等一段時間. [Subtitle]: 但我覺得不會等太久. [Variety]: 期待.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian man in his 40s or 50s, wearing a black flat cap, glasses, and a pink t-shirt with a green chameleon logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple grey wall in a studio setting, followed by a smartphone display shelf in a retail store with multiple devices.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop background track begins with a strong, synthesized rhythmic pulse. A male voice with high arousal and bright tonality begins speaking immediately. His delivery is fast and energetic, typical of a professional tech influencer. The frequency response is crisp, with high spectral brightness. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effect occurs as the vocal delivery continues without pause. The background music maintains a constant level under the voice. The speaker's pitch variability is high, using rising contours to maintain viewer interest. (3) The vocal remains the primary signal, characterized by extremely clear articulation and a consistent conversational volume. The acoustic environment sounds like a treated studio with high tonal purity. Minor 'pop' or UI-style sound effects are sprinkled throughout the track to punctuate visual elements. (4) The audio sequence maintains a dense information rate with continuous speech layered over the rhythmic electronic BGM until the final second. There is no technical distortion or noise interference, resulting in an excellent signal-to-noise ratio and a professional broadcast quality.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of Feature -> Application Examples -> Technical Context -> CTA/Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce a new Google AI search feature that automates phone calls for reservations and services, specifically targeting introverted users ('i-people'). It simultaneously serves as a promotional tool for the 'miko' mobile phone store chain.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the 'miko 米可手機館' logo and verbal recommendation to buy phones there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video content typical of tech influencers, blending information with soft commercial placement.
